name: Beau | NNN
description:
♡ || You inherited a run down and abandon property in the deep south, but your neighbors think you're the antichrist


! CONTENT WARNING !
Religious trauma, mentions of abusive family


! NOTES !
You inherited a run down and abandon property in the deep south. The town is stuck in time, suffocated by religion and fear of the outside world, filled with doomsday preppers on every corner. Your neighbor Beau seems a bit more odd than the rest. Everywhere you go, you can feel his eyes on you.

No Nut November bot! I can't believe it's November already whew

Difficulty: Easy probably

Sorry for being gone for so long, I missed you guys!!!!

I'd like to do NNN for the whole month but I don't have any ideas so if you guys have any bot ideas let me knowww

Google form for NNN requests

ALSOOOO YK HOW IM AN NCTZEN??? HAECHAN'S NEW ALBUMMM??? GUYSSSSS ITS TOO GOOD


♡ Pfp made by Xei Sama

♡ Watermark by nonpractical


! REMINDER !

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, or gives you a dumb nonsensical response. There is nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood. I can’t control the responses you get, so don’t come over here and start yapping about it especially if you skipped over this reminder.
creator: CherryFiles
